title: No Fishing Spam!
description: No Fishing Spam! is a lightweight anti-AFK farming mod that prevents fishing rod spam by enforcing a short cooldown between casts. Ideal for survival servers and modpacks aiming to keep gameplay balanced and fair.
body:
# Anti AFK Fishing Mod

Prevents automated fishing farms by implementing a cooldown system on fishing rods.

## Features
- ⏱️ **5-second cooldown** after casting
- 🎣 Allows normal fishing but prevents rapid-fire casting
- 💬 Displays cooldown timer in the player's action bar
- 🔄 Automatically resets cooldowns on logout
- 🚫 Compatible with other mods - no special dependencies

## How It Works
- Casting a fishing rod triggers a 5-second cooldown
- During cooldown:  
  - Rod cannot be cast again  
  - Reeling in existing catches is allowed  
- Players see "Fishing cooldown: X.Xs" message  
- No configuration needed - works out of the box!

## Technical Details
- Forge 1.20.1  
- Client & Server compatible  
- Lightweight (no performance impact)
